content.verdict: Baros is the grand dame of Maldivian honeymoons — 75 villas on a compact, lush North Malé island with a much-loved Lighthouse Restaurant overwater dining room and a Condé Nast Gold List reputation. One of the Maldives' oldest resorts but consistently renovated, it offers timeless romance at accessible five-star prices.
content.best_room: The Water Pool Villa — thatched roof, sun deck with private pool, ladder into the house reef. For beach lovers, the Baros Premium Pool Villa sits beachfront with a garden wall for privacy.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Speedboat Transfer
itinerary_7_nights.description: 25-minute speedboat from Malé. Classic welcome with coconut water, villa orientation, sunset at Sails Bar.

itinerary_7_nights.title: House Reef Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Baros' house reef is ranked among the best — full morning snorkel, poolside lunch, sunset at the Piano Deck with live jazz.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Lighthouse Dinner
itinerary_7_nights.description: Spa afternoon, signature overwater dinner at the Lighthouse Restaurant — degustation menu with wine pairing.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Private Sandbank Experience
itinerary_7_nights.description: Boat drop-off at a sandbank with gourmet picnic and Champagne, sunset dhoni cruise with dolphins.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa & Beach Dinner
itinerary_7_nights.description: Couples ritual at The Serenity Spa, private beach dinner with a dedicated waiter and candlelight.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Dive or Relax
itinerary_7_nights.description: Two-tank dive trip or lazy day by the pool, dinner at Cayenne Grill with live guitar.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: Slow breakfast at Lime, final reef swim, speedboat back to Malé.

caveats: Older-style villa design than newer peers (though well-maintained)
No children under 8 means family-heavy trips not ideal

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes — a classic honeymoon island with high couples-review scores and timeless romance.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: December to April for dry, sunny weather. Low season offers strong value.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No, but minimum age 8 and the ambience is couples-focused.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: 25-minute speedboat from Velana International Airport (MLE) — runs 24/7, no seaplane required.
